title: stapelia × mutabilis var. discolor
intro: Stapelia × mutabilis var. discolor, also known as the 'discolored starfish cactus', is a unique and rare succulent plant that is a hybrid of the Stapelia and Mutabilis species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, derived from its latex and sap. The health benefits of Stapelia × mutabilis var. discolor include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and certain respiratory issues, while also offering antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's latex is often extracted and used in topical creams, ointments, and salves to harness its medicinal benefits.
